seoTitle: Tansey vs Tara — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tansey and Tara. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tansey and Tara.
heading: Tansey vs Tara — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tansey, Queensland and Tara, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tansey and Tara have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Tansey or Tara safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tansey has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Tara scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tansey scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Tara scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tansey or Tara?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tansey has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
